title: Harden validation for migrated and imported records
description: Strengthen validation and import-facing rules for records produced by migrations or external systems. Focus on filename/id safety, dangling references, status/priority mappings, and imported text that later flows into generated reports or views.
acceptance: Record ids that become filenames are constrained or validated so path traversal and unsafe filenames are rejected.
Migration-relevant references such as dependencies, scopes, prompts, message threads, and issue/task links produce clear diagnostics when invalid.
GitHub/import mapping edge cases are reviewed and documented or tested where appropriate.
docs/migration-guide.md reflects any new validation rules an LLM or human migrator must follow.
bun test, typecheck, biome check, waystation validate, and rebuilt binary smoke checks are green.
notes: This is Phase 9's main hardening slice. Keep CLI/dashboard/MCP thin; any new rule should live in schema/validate/core helpers first.
